name: Check of "More" button in books sections in Palace
fullName: Catalog Navigation: Check of "More" button in books sections in Palace

steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  More button is present on each section of books on catalog book screen
When  I click More button from random book section and save name of section as 'sectionInfo' on catalog book screen
When  I tap Back button on subcategory screen

labels.value: Check of "More" button in books sections in Palace
